About

Engineering Intelligent Automation Ecosystems

AI Architect
automation.engineer
uptime99.98%

I specialize in building AI automation ecosystems that help businesses eliminate repetitive operations and scale intelligently.

With experience spanning full-stack development, engineering leadership, AI workflow orchestration, and enterprise automation, I design systems that connect APIs, LLMs, databases, SaaS platforms, and intelligent agents into unified automation pipelines.

AI Workflow AutomationMulti-Agent Systemsn8n ArchitectureLangChainLLM ApplicationsEnterprise AutomationFull-Stack Engineering

AI Pipeline Engineering

Orchestrated multi-agent workflows

A glimpse at how triggers, LLM agents, retrieval, and downstream systems wire together into one intelligent pipeline.

workflow/agent-orchestrator.jsonrunning
Trigger
RAG Lookup
LLM Agent
Database
Slack
Email Out
~/agent.log
[09:42:11] trigger.webhook → payload received
[09:42:11] rag.search('docs/policy') → 4 chunks
[09:42:12] llm.invoke(model=gpt-4o-mini)
[09:42:12] tool.crm.lookup({id:8821}) ✓
[09:42:13] agent.decision → notify_owner=true
[09:42:13] db.upsert(events) ✓
[09:42:13] slack.post(#ops) ✓
[09:42:13] email.send(client) ✓
✓ pipeline complete · 1.41s
